profile: Versatile frontend-focused engineer recognised for leading teams creating robust, scalable and beautiful user-focused applications. Leveraging strong technical acumen, guided teams to conceptualise, plan and implement high-impact solutions and proofs of concept. Lifelong learner whose passion for technology sparked at an early age, informing a deep-rooted curiosity and commitment to technical advancement in the engineering landscape.

company.name: Natcap
company.description: Nature Intelligence SaaS platform helping some of the largest global enterprises measure their impact on nature.

roles.title: Staff Product Engineer
experience: Design and build a new Risk product, used by 8 multinationals to assess critical business risks.
Lead product development of data-rich customer insights in close collaboration with Product Manager & Designer.
Drive adoption of low-code tools to accelerate prototyping and shorten iteration cycles.
Assume interim leadership responsibilities following CTO’s departure, covering both management and technology strategy for a ten-member team.
Successfully designed & delivered three significant new features within a single quarter.
Establish product roadmapping process in response to misaligned business, product and technology strategies.
Deliver a significant refactor to unlock a strategically important organisation feature.
Strengthen backend expertise, gaining experience with Python FastAPI, SQLAlchemy and Pytest.

company.name: Overleaf
company.description: Collaborative LaTeX editor used by 16 million students and academics at 6,800 institutions worldwide.

roles.title: Engineering Manager & Staff Frontend Engineer
roles.note: Progressed from a role dedicated to post-acquisition system integration and v2 release into a broader leadership role with frontend strategy focus, particularly optimising and modernising legacy technology.
experience: Overhauled legacy frontend systems to improve the user experience and support the scalability of core revenue-generating technology that supports over half a million daily users.
Enabled 45% y-o-y growth in revenue and user base through improved developer and user experiences.
Led phased migration from legacy Angular v1 to React to massively increase test coverage, security, and developer productivity.
Rewrote core editor, using modernised CodeMirror 6 library, unlocking key business milestones and long-requested new features.
Implemented frontend test harness using Mocha/Chai/Sinon/JSDOM, enabling test-driven culture and taking number of tests from none to over several thousand.
Introduced formatting/linting tools such as Prettier & ESLint to make code review more efficient.
Partnered with executives, product and UX teams to prioritise roadmap and guide technical strategy while championing user-focused and iterative development.
Created and drove technical strategy, prioritising projects based on engineering input and business strategy.
Served as the go-to technical resource for frontend React-focused development and legacy code refactoring
Built and led a highly-engaged, scalable seven-member engineering team from the ground up.
Drove team recruitment, culture-building, performance, and growth to foster skill development and productivity.

roles.title: Senior Engineer
experience: Orchestrated transition from Overleaf v1 to a combined v2 platform released after acquisition of ShareLaTeX, managing integration, user migration, and legacy feature protection while introducing new functionalities.
Integrated two complex products in just two years, reducing cognitive overhead and streamlining redundancies created by the acquisition.

Transitioned a pivotal user-facing WYSIWYG-esque editor into the consolidated codebase, devising and executing the launch plan to facilitate the migration of tens of millions of user accounts and projects.
Implemented new project history view in React, allowing users to easily see and restore previous versions.
Upgraded build system from outdated Grunt/RequireJS to Webpack for improved developer experience and reliability as well as reduced bundle size.

Served as the frontend expert across the rapidly growing start-up, sharing knowledge and best practices as a technical mentor leading regular lunch-and-learns and other professional development initiatives.

roles.title: Web Developer
experience: Led design and development of web applications and new features using Backbone.js, Laravel PHP, and MySQL.

education_and_achievements.title: University of Portsmouth
education_and_achievements.description: Bachelor of Science in Web Technologies

education_and_achievements.title: LDX3 (Formerly Lead Dev London), London, June 2025
education_and_achievements.description: Spoke at a large engineering leadership-focused conference, introducing pedagogical concepts in the context of software engineering. Talk title: Creating the next generation of Senior Engineers.

education_and_achievements.title: Code Your Future, Core Maintainer, Technical Education
education_and_achievements.description: Initiate the Tech Ed Syllabus team to lead enhancement of core technical education curriculum; develop learning materials and instruct students in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, NodeJS to contribute to a 70% employment rate among trainees.
